title: Hiligaynon 101
subtitle: A Beginner's Journey to Ilonggo
audience: Complete beginners, heritage learners and family-connected learners
summary: A practical first step into Hiligaynon with beginner-friendly lessons, greetings, everyday basics and guided practice.
seoDescription: Learn Hiligaynon from the beginning with Hiligaynon 101: A Beginner's Journey to Ilonggo by Chanelle Ramos.
features: Core sounds, spelling patterns and everyday basics
Greetings, politeness, numbers and simple sentence building

title: Hiligaynon 101
subtitle: Practical Conversations for Everyday Life
audience: Learners ready to practise useful everyday dialogue
summary: Conversation-focused Hiligaynon practice for family, home, travel, shopping, dining and everyday situations.
seoDescription: Practise everyday Ilonggo dialogue with Hiligaynon 101: Practical Conversations for Everyday Life by Chanelle Ramos.
features: Polite everyday expressions and useful responses
A natural follow-on from the beginner book

title: Hiligaynon 101 Kids
subtitle: My First Words Colouring Book
audience: Children ages 3-6 learning with a parent, grandparent or carer
summary: A colourful first-words activity book where children learn simple Hiligaynon words through familiar pictures, colouring and repeat-after-me practice.
seoDescription: A Hiligaynon colouring book for kids ages 3-6, with simple first words, English meanings and family-led colouring practice.
features: Simple Hiligaynon words paired with English meanings
Designed for shared practice with family

title: Hiligaynon 101 Kids
subtitle: Animals, Food and Nature Colouring Book
shortTitle: Animals, Food and Nature Colouring Book
audience: Children ages 3-6 ready for more themed Hiligaynon words with an adult helper
summary: A themed colouring book that expands early Hiligaynon practice into animals, food and nature vocabulary through playful, family-led colouring activities.
seoDescription: A Hiligaynon colouring book for kids featuring animals, food and nature vocabulary, with simple Hiligaynon words and family-led colouring practice.
features: Animals, food and nature vocabulary for young learners
Large colouring pages for hands-on practice
A natural next kids book after My First Words
